questions.question: What is the K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) algorithm?
How does the KNN algorithm make predictions?
keyPoints: Uses their labels to make predictions

questions.question: What is the role of the 'k' parameter in the KNN algorithm?
keyPoints: Determines the number of nearest neighbors

questions.question: Can the KNN algorithm handle high-dimensional data?
keyPoints: Yes, but can be computationally expensive

questions.question: Is the KNN algorithm sensitive to outliers?
Explain the K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) algorithm and its applications.
keyPoints: Applications in image classification, recommender systems, and natural language processing

questions.question: Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of the KNN algorithm.
keyPoints: Advantages: simple, effective, can handle non-linear relationships
Disadvantages: high computational cost, sensitive to outliers

questions.question: Explain how the KNN algorithm can be parallelized.
keyPoints: Can be parallelized using GPU acceleration or distributed computing
